title: Git set go
subtitle: A hands-on workshop designed to introduce students to version control and collaborative development using Git and GitHub. The session focused on building practical skills essential for modern software development.
description:
Title of the event: Git Set Go – Hands-on Workshop on Git & GitHub. 
 EVENT DETAILS: This workshop was conducted over two days with the objective of introducing students to version control systems and collaborative software development using Git and GitHub. DAY 1 (26 February 2026): An interactive session was conducted to introduce students to the fundamentals of version control systems. Students learned basic Git commands such as repository initialization, staging, committing.
location: Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering, New Delhi
highlights: DAY 1 (26 February 2026): An interactive session was conducted to introduce students to the fundamentals of version control systems.
DAY 2 (27 February 2026): A hands-on practical workshop was conducted where students gained experience working with GitHub.
It aimed to help them understand version control systems and manage code efficiently.
